day2_lunch_sea.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea.text: "I packed lunch again today. I noticed you seemed to like the rolled egg yesterday, so I added extra."

day2_lunch_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_2.text: "Hey, {name}... do you hang out with a lot of other people besides me?"

day2_lunch_sea_3.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_3.text: *Sea gently grabs the back of my hand. Small, warm fingers.*

day2_lunch_sea_4.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_4.text: *"...{name} is mine, you know." Sea whispered. I thought she was joking... but her expression was serious. Wait, she's smiling now, so it must be a joke... right?*

day2_lunch_yuna.name: Choi Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna.text: "Senpai! Look at the photos I took today, the hill behind school is so pretty..."

day2_lunch_yuna_2.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_2.text: *Scrolling through, I spot another odd photo. Stacks of documents in front of the faculty office. ...Why did she photograph that?*

day2_lunch_yuna_3.name: Choi Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_3.text: "Oh, that was an accident! I'll delete it!"

day2_lunch_riin.name: School Nurse
day2_lunch_riin.text: "{name}, perfect timing. Your transfer student health checkup hasn't been done yet. Mind if I run some tests?"

day2_lunch_riin_2.name: School Nurse
day2_lunch_riin_2.text: "Blood pressure, eyesight, weight... I'll check a few things. Could you roll up your sleeve?"

day2_lunch_riin_3.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_3.text: *For a health checkup... her questions were a bit odd. Sleep patterns, drug allergies, family medical history. Does a school nurse really ask all this?*

day2_lunch_rooftop.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop.text: *Walking down the corridor toward the rooftop, I hear a voice from below the stairs.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_2.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_2.text: *...It's Ms. Eunsu's voice. "...The subject's condition is stable. We can proceed as planned..." She seems to be on the phone. What's she talking about?*

day2_lunch_rooftop_3.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *I made a noise and she quickly hung up. Probably just a work call.*
